feed.title: Google Cloud: Application Design Center
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Application Design Center

entry.content:
Application Design Center supports the following components in General Availability:

  • CA Service
  • Private Service Connect Endpoint
  • Private Service Connect Producer

Application Design Center supports the following components in Preview:

  • Authorization Extension
  • Authorization Policy
  • Authorization Policy Extension
  • Compute Address
  • Firebase AI Logic Prompt Template
  • Firebase Multi-Platform App
  • Routes
  • Agent Registry Agent
  • Agent Registry Binding
  • Agent Registry Endpoint
  • Agent Registry MCP Server
  • Firestore Security Rules
  • IAM Connector
  • Model Armor Floor Setting
  • Model Armor Template
  • VPC Network
  • Cloud Workflows
  • Firebase AI Logic
  • Firebase App Check
  • Firebase Authentication
  • Compute Firewall
  • Cloud KMS
  • Internal Load Balancer
  • Agent Registry Service
  • Artifact Registry
  • Cloud Run functions
  • Cloud Tasks
  • Managed Airflow
  • Cloud DNS Managed Zone
  • Cloud DNS Response Policy
  • Document AI
  • Cloud NAT
  • Cloud Router
  • Cloud Router Interface
  • Secure Web Proxy
  • Compute Instance
  • Cloud Scheduler
  • Agent Platform Runtime
entry.summary: The Application Design Center has reached General Availability for several key components, including CA Service, Private Service Connect Endpoint, and Private Service Connect Producer. Additionally, a range of new features are now in Preview, offering expanded capabilities for application development and management.
entry.title: Feature: Application Design Center components now available

entry.content: If your application deployment fails, you can troubleshoot and fix errors (Preview). For more information, see Troubleshoot and fix deployment issues.
entry.summary: Troubleshoot and resolve issues when your application deployment fails. This new feature helps you identify and fix errors efficiently. For detailed guidance, refer to the documentation on troubleshooting deployment problems.
entry.title: Feature: Fix Application Deployment Errors

entry.content: Create a composite template (Preview) using multiple application templates and components. For more information, see Design composite templates.
entry.summary: You can now create composite templates using multiple application templates and components. This feature allows for more complex and reusable template designs.
entry.title: Feature: Create Composite Templates

entry.content:
You can store templates and applications in the following regions:

  • Tokyo, Japan (asia-northeast1)
  • Seoul, South Korea (asia-northeast3)
  • Taiwan (asia-east1)
  • Hong Kong (asia-east2)
  • Delhi, India (asia-south2)
  • Singapore (asia-southeast1)
  • Jakarta, Indonesia (asia-southeast2)
  • Melbourne, Australia (australia-southeast2)
  • Hamina, Finland (europe-north1)
  • Stockholm, Sweden (europe-north2)
  • Warsaw, Poland (europe-central2)
  • St. Ghislain, Belgium (europe-west1)
  • London, England (europe-west2)
  • Frankfurt, Germany (europe-west3)
  • Milan, Italy (europe-west8)
  • Paris, France (europe-west9)
  • Turin, Italy (europe-west12)
  • Eemshaven, Netherlands (europe-west4)
  • Zurich, Switzerland (europe-west6)
  • Madrid, Spain (europe-southwest1)
  • Columbus, Ohio (us-east5)
  • Ashburn, Virginia (us-east4)
  • The Dalles, Oregon (us-west1)
  • Los Angeles, California (us-west2)
  • Salt Lake City, Utah (us-west3)
  • Las Vegas, Nevada (us-west4)
  • Council Bluffs, Iowa (us-central1)
  • Dallas, Texas (us-south1)
  • Montréal, Canada (northamerica-northeast1)
  • Toronto, Canada (northamerica-northeast2)
  • Queretaro, Mexico (northamerica-south1)
  • São Paulo, Brazil (southamerica-east1)
  • Santiago, Chile (southamerica-west1)
  • Johannesburg, South Africa (africa-south1)
  • Doha, Qatar (me-central1)
  • Tel Aviv, Israel (me-west1)
  • Global

For more information, see the following:

  • A list of available App Design Center locations.
  • To select and manage a region, see Select a region.
  • To share a catalog between spaces, see share a catalog.
entry.summary: You can now store templates and applications in a wider range of global regions. This expansion offers greater flexibility and proximity to your users. Explore the newly added locations to optimize your deployments.
entry.title: Feature: New regional options available

entry.content:
Use the following Google-provided application templates:

  • Single region GKE cluster and workload (Preview)
  • Enterprise-grade production GKE cluster and workload (Preview)
  • AI Pre-trained Inference GKE cluster and workload (Preview)
entry.summary: Explore our new application templates for GKE, designed to simplify the deployment of single-region, enterprise-grade, and AI-powered workloads. These templates offer a streamlined path to setting up robust and efficient applications on Google Kubernetes Engine.
entry.title: Feature: New GKE Application Templates Available

entry.content: You can import Terraform modules to create components (Preview). For more information, see Import components.
entry.summary: You can now import Terraform modules to create components. This feature is currently in Preview.
entry.title: Feature: Import Terraform modules

entry.content: You can set up Application Design Center using a single project boundary. For more information, see Set up Application Design Center.
entry.summary: Application Design Center can now be set up within a single project boundary.
entry.title: Feature: Application Design Center Setup

entry.content:
Application Design Center supports the following components:

  • Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) Node Pool
  • GKE Standard Cluster
  • GKE Autopilot Cluster
  • Firestore
entry.summary: Check out the latest features of Application Design Center!
entry.title: Feature: Application Design Center

entry.content: You can export Terraform to your code repository. For more information, see Export Terraform code.
entry.summary: Export your Terraform code to your repository.
entry.title: Feature: Terraform Export

entry.content:
Application Design Center is generally available (GA), including the following:

  • Application Design Center Google Cloud CLI.
  • Design Center API.
entry.summary: Application Design Center is now generally available. This includes the Application Design Center Google Cloud CLI and the Design Center API.
entry.title: Announcement: Application Design Center is Generally Available
